rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff Edith Mazzaferri'S Requests For Production Of Documents (Set Two) And Requests For Adminssions And Genuiness Of Documents; Motion To Continue Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Edith Mazzaferri's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Production of Documents and Requests for Admission and Genuineness of Documents directed to Ronald Mazzaferro is granted. Ronald Mazzaferro must serve further responses no later than September 13, 2013. To the extent Ronald Mazzaferro claims a privilege against self-incrimination, he must make a specific showing that each discovery question or request might tend to incriminate him. To the extent Ronald Mazzaferro asserts the attorney client privilege he must provide sufficient factual information for the propounding party to evaluate the merits of the claim, including a privilege log. The Motion to Continue is off calendar as moot. The Motion for Sanctions is granted. Ronald Mazzaferro shall pay the moving party sanctions in the amount of $3,500 within 20 days. Prevailing party to prepare the order. Any party requesting to argue the tentative ruling shall notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on August 14, 2013.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Great Sunset Ventures, Inc. To Respond To Plaintiffs Requests For Admissions And Genuineness Of Documents; Motion To Continue Discovery; Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Edith Mazzaferri's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Admission and Genuineness of Documents directed to Great Sunset Ventures (GSV) is granted. No opposition filed. GSV must provide further responses by September 13, 2013. To the extent GSV asserts the attorney client privilege, it must provide sufficient factual information for the propounding party to evaluate the merits of the cliam, including a privilege log. The Motion to Continue is off calendar as moot. The Motion for Sanctions is granted. GSV shall pay moving party sanctions of $2,000 within 20 days. Prevailing party to prepare the order. Any party requesting to argue the tentative ruling shall notify the court (415-551-3702)and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on August 14, 2013.
